member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.AuthModes
member.summary: Well-known authentication mode constants shared across all plugins. Cloud-specific modes (Azure, AWS, GCP) are defined by their respective authentication plugins (e.g. AzAuthModes in PSDataRepository.Authentications.AzAuth).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.AuthModes.None
member.summary: No authentication required (e.g. local Disk, InMemory).

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IAuthenticationInfo
member.summary: Generic, cloud-agnostic bag of authentication information passed to providers. Each authentication plugin populates this with the values it needs. Providers retrieve values via or the well-known key.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IAuthenticationInfo.Mode
member.summary: Authentication mode string selected by the user (e.g. "None", "ClientSecret").

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IAuthenticationInfo.Get``1(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves an authentication value by key. Returns default if the key was not set.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IAuthenticationInfo.Set``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Sets an authentication value by key.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext
member.summary: Provides the provider's Connect method with resolved parameter values and authentication information.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext.GetParameter``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a parameter value by name, as supplied by the user via dynamic parameters. Returns default if the parameter was not provided.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext.GetString(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a string parameter value, or null if not provided.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext.GetInt(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets an integer parameter value, or the specified default if not provided.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext.GetSwitch(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a switch parameter value (true if present).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext.GetSecureString(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a SecureString parameter value, or null if not provided.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext.AuthenticationMode
member.summary: The resolved authentication mode for this connection.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext.Authentication
member.summary: The full authentication option bag. Provider implementations use this to obtain tokens, connection strings, certificates, etc.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository
member.summary: Storage-agnostic abstraction over a message queue.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository.SendAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a single message to the queue.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository.SendBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends multiple messages. Providers MAY batch internally for efficiency.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository.ReceiveAsync(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Receives a single message and hides it for ; returns null when the queue is empty.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository.ReceiveBatchAsync(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Receives up to messages.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository.DeleteAsync(PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acknowledges and removes a received message using its .

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository.GetMessageCountAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the approximate message count, or -1 if unknown.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository.PeekAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Peeks messages without affecting their visibility.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IQueueRepository.PeekByIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Peeks a single message by its ID without removing it from the queue.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IRepository
member.summary: Marker interface for all repository types. Provides type safety for session management.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository
member.summary: Defines basic operations for repositories that store text and binary data by name.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.ListAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists item names, optionally filtered by a prefix.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.WriteAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes a UTF-8 text content to the named item, overwriting if it exists.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.WriteAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Text.Encoding,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes text content using the specified encoding, overwriting if it exists.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.WriteAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes binary content to the named item, overwriting if it exists.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.ExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true if the named item exists.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.ReadAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads text content (UTF-8 by default) for the named item.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.ReadAsync(System.String,System.Text.Encoding,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads text content using the specified encoding for the named item.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.ReadBinaryAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the raw bytes of the named item.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes the named item. No-op if it does not exist.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IStorageRepository.GetItemPath(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the full path or URI of a storage item.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IFilesystemStorageRepository
member.summary: Specialized file system repository with stream support.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IFilesystemStorageRepository.WriteAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes the contents of to the named item using streaming I/O.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IFilesystemStorageRepository.OpenReadAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens the named item for streaming read. The caller owns the returned .

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ISecretRepository
member.summary: Secret storage operations (e.g. Azure Key Vault, encrypted disk).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ISecretRepository.GetSecretAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the secret value, or null when it does not exist.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ISecretRepository.SetSecretAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates or updates a secret.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ISecretRepository.DeleteSecretAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a secret. No-op if it does not exist.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IMetadataStorageRepository
member.summary: Rich item metadata listing.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IMetadataStorageRepository.ListItemsAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists items with metadata (size, timestamps, content type), optionally recursively.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition
member.summary: Describes a single dynamic parameter that a provider needs for connection. Used by Connect-PSDataRepository to build RuntimeDefinedParameter instances.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.Name
member.summary: Parameter name as seen in PowerShell (e.g. "ContainerName", "Host").

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.ParameterType
member.summary: CLR type of the parameter (e.g. typeof(string), typeof(int), typeof(SecureString)).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.Mandatory
member.summary: Whether the parameter is mandatory.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.Position
member.summary: Positional index (null = not positional).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.HelpMessage
member.summary: Help message shown in PowerShell.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.Aliases
member.summary: Optional parameter aliases (e.g. "FilePath" for "Path").

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.DefaultValue
member.summary: Default value when not specified by user.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.MinValue
member.summary: Minimum value for ValidateRange (applicable to numeric types).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.ProviderParameterDefinition.MaxValue
member.summary: Maximum value for ValidateRange (applicable to numeric types).

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage
member.summary: Provider-agnostic message DTO.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.Id
member.summary: Broker-assigned message identifier.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.Content
member.summary: Message body as a UTF-8 string.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.Receipt
member.summary: Opaque receipt/lock token required to acknowledge or delete the message.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.DequeueCount
member.summary: Number of times this message has been dequeued.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.InsertedOn
member.summary: Timestamp when the message was enqueued.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.ExpiresOn
member.summary: Timestamp when the message expires (if the provider supports TTL).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.NextVisibleOn
member.summary: Timestamp when the message becomes visible again (invisibility window end).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.Headers
member.summary: Optional message headers/properties.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.QueueMessage.InternalData
member.summary: Provider-specific internal data (e.g., ServiceBusReceivedMessage). Used by providers that need the original message object for operations like Complete/Abandon.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics
member.summary: Centralized OpenTelemetry instrumentation for PSDataRepository. Provides for distributed tracing and for metrics (counters, histograms).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.SourceName
F:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.Version
member.summary: Assembly version used as the telemetry version.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.ActivitySource
member.summary: ActivitySource for distributed tracing of repository operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.Meter
member.summary: Meter for repository operation metrics (counters, histograms).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.StorageReadCount
member.summary: Counts total storage read operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.StorageWriteCount
member.summary: Counts total storage write operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.StorageDeleteCount
member.summary: Counts total storage delete operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.StorageListCount
member.summary: Counts total storage list operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.StorageErrorCount
member.summary: Counts storage operation errors.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.QueueSendCount
member.summary: Counts total queue send operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.QueueReceiveCount
member.summary: Counts total queue receive operations.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.StorageOperationDuration
member.summary: Measures storage operation duration in milliseconds.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.StoragePayloadSize
member.summary: Measures read/write payload size in bytes.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.StartStorageActivity(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Starts a new for a storage operation. Returns null if no listener is registered (no-op by default).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryDiagnostics.RecordStorageOperation(System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.summary: Records a storage operation completion with duration and optional payload size.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo
member.summary: Represents metadata about an item in a storage repository.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.Name
member.summary: Item name (last path segment).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.FullPath
member.summary: Full path, URI, or key identifying the item within the provider.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.Size
member.summary: Size in bytes, when known.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.LastModified
member.summary: Last modification timestamp, when known.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.CreatedOn
member.summary: Creation timestamp, when known.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.ContentType
member.summary: Content type / MIME, when known.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.IsDirectory
member.summary: True when this entry is a directory/container rather than a leaf item.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.Provider
member.summary: Name of the provider that produced this entry (e.g. AzureBlob, Disk).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.RepositoryItemInfo.Extension
member.summary: File extension (including the leading dot) for leaf items, otherwise null.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.SecureStringHelper
member.summary: Centralized helpers for converting to plaintext safely. The unmanaged BSTR copy is zeroed after use; note that the returned managed string cannot be deterministically cleared (inherent .NET limitation).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.SecureStringHelper.ToPlainString(System.Security.SecureString)
member.summary: Converts a to a plaintext string. The unmanaged copy is zeroed via .

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Abstractions.SecureStringHelper.ToPlainBytes(System.Security.SecureString,System.Text.Encoding)
member.summary: Converts a directly to a UTF-8 byte array without creating an intermediate managed that could linger on the heap. The unmanaged BSTR copy is zeroed after use. The caller is responsible for clearing the returned array when no longer needed (for example via CryptographicOperations.ZeroMemory).
